response.justification: Candidate brings 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, plus high-throughput systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic. However, the resume shows weak Python signal (skills list omits Python entirely), and distributed-systems depth appears limited to one role years ago. Strong craftsmanship, TDD, and breadth are evident, but Staff-level technical strategy scope and stakeholder leadership are not clearly demonstrated.
strengths: Recent hands-on AI-agent/MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq
Proven high-throughput, low-latency systems experience at Sociomantic
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, teaching, open-source ownership
concerns: Python not listed in skills — a must-have for the role
Limited evidence of Staff-level technical strategy and cross-functional stakeholder leadership
Distributed-systems depth concentrated in older role; recent work skews product/full-stack
